text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I placed... I suppose that counts as a good result.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not about to stop here. After all, I'm a
top-class Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You know what I mean, right?
choice_data_list: The King I know is always moving forward!
I'm sure you'll get a first-rate result next time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! That's right! I am King Halo, after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Nothing less than first-rate and first place will do
for this century's premier Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The only thing fit for a king is a throne. And next
time, I intend on claiming it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Naturally! It seems you do understand.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I expect you to work through the night,
coming up with a first-rate training plan and an
equally worthy strategy!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm looking forward to your first-rate
efforts for this first-rate Umamusume.
